feedback.text: Stop Killing Games is trying to regulate these unfair practices towards consumers, I have been a player for virtually every life and since the perpetual games were born, I have lost access to a variety of content and games worth hundreds of euros. The possibilities to save this real art and culture exist and at various levels of complexity. — issue a patch that ‘unlocks’ all content so that everyone, even in the future, can enjoy the full content. — release a complete executable and drm-free offline – make the open source code. Efforts to recover many of these games have been made by many people who came together for one purpose, but it is very difficult and cannot always be done. We want the integrity of games to be available forever once bought.
